title: pelargonium × anosmon
intro: Pelargonium × anosmon, commonly known as Rosalina or Cape Lavender, is a hybrid plant within the Pelargonium genus, known for its fragrant leaves and stems. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to the presence of compounds such as geraniol and linalool. The health benefits of Rosalina include its potential to alleviate stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health concerns. In terms of herbal preparations, Rosalina is often used in teas, essential oils, and tinctures, allowing for a range of applications and uses in aromatherapy and traditional medicine.
